examples: He built a reputation in the 1970s as a social satirist.
We laugh when a great satirist like Swift writes about war in Gulliver's Travels.
P.J. o 'rourke, of course, is an author, satirist and humorist.
The latest offering from the country's leading social satirist, Chris Lilley, offers yet more proof.
As a satirist of social pretensions, Evelyn Waugh (1903-66) is something of a Thackeray step-child.
